name: Corporate Annualized or Seasonal Installment Election

eligibility.description: Available to corporations with fluctuating or seasonal income; seasonal method requires 70% of income to fall within 6 consecutive months.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Corporations can lower required quarterly installments by using annualized income or adjusted seasonal installment methods rather than standard 25% payments.
